memoryArtifacts.description: Herbert (Herbertus Camerarius) in Burke's Dormant, Abeyant, Forfeited and Extinct Peerages, pg. 271. It is noted that this record skips the son of Herbertus Camerarius, Henry FitzHerbert, and goes to Herbert's grandson (called his son), also named Herbert (Herbert FitzHenry or Herbert FitzHerbert I).

zh.Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France: 法國哈帕格-亞登芒內萊姆斯
zh.Vermand, Aisne, Picardie, France: 法國皮卡迪艾斯維文德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Eudes comte de Vermandois於0979年8月29日出生在法國皮卡迪艾斯維文德時，他的父親Herbert III de Vermandois26歲，母親Ermengarde de Bar-sur-Seine20歲。他於大約1026年與Parvia de Chaulnes在法國維曼多斯結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1045年5月25日在法國維曼多斯享年65歲。

zh-hans.Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France: 法国哈帕格-亞登芒內萊姆斯
zh-hans.Vermand, Aisne, Picardie, France: 法国皮卡迪艾斯維文德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eudes comte de Vermandois于0979年8月29日出生在法国皮卡迪艾斯維文德时，他的父亲Herbert III de Vermandois26岁，母亲Ermengarde de Bar-sur-Seine20岁。他于大约1026年与Parvia de Chaulnes在法国維曼多斯结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1045年5月25日在法国維曼多斯享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eudes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Eade , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Edes
meanings: This name is found as a variant or pet form of Edith in Yorkshire from the 15th century onwards. It is recorded as a baptismal name in the 16th century. In present-day use it probably refers to the biblical ‘Garden of Eden’, crew ῾eden ‘place of pleasure’. As a boy's name it may also represent a variant of Aidan or a transferred use of a surname, itself derived in the Middle Ages from a given name Edun or Edon. This is of Old English origin, from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + hūn ‘bear cub’.

variants.name: Edds
meanings: Pet form of any of several old German names beginning with Ed-. The Elder and Younger Eddas are also the names of two influential Old Icelandic books of Norse myths and poems.

en.lifeSummary: When Eudes comte de Vermandois was born on 29 August 0979, in Vermand, Aisne, Picardie, France, his father, Herbert III de Vermandois, was 26 and his mother, Ermengarde de Bar-sur-Seine, was 20. He married Parvia de Chaulnes about 1026, in Vermandois, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 25 May 1045, in Vermandois, France, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eudes comte de Vermandois est né le 29 août 0979, à Vermand, Aisne, Picardie, France, son père, Herbert III de Vermandois, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde de Bar-sur-Seine, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Parvia de Chaulnes environ 1026, à Vermandois, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 25 mai 1045, à Vermandois, France, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eudes comte de Vermandois am 29. August 0979 in Vermand, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Herbert III de Vermandois 26 und seine Mutter Ermengarde de Bar-sur-Seine 20. Er hat um 1026 in Vermandois, Frankreich Parvia de Chaulnes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Mai 1045 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Vermandois, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eudes comte de Vermandois è nato il il 29 agosto 0979 nel Vermand, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, il suo padre, Herbert III de Vermandois, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Ermengarde de Bar-sur-Seine, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Parvia de Chaulnes circa 1026, nel Vermandois, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 maggio 1045, nel Vermandois, Francia, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.Vermand, Aisne, Picardie, France: フランスピカーディエイスンバーマンド
ja.lifeSummary: Eudes comte de Vermandoisが0979年8月29日にフランスピカーディエイスンバーマンドで生まれた時，父Herbert III de Vermandoisは26歳，母Ermengarde de Bar-sur-Seineは20歳であった。約1026年にフランスバーマンドイスでParvia de Chaulnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1045年5月25日にフランスバーマンドイスで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eudes comte de Vermandois(이)가 0979년 8월 29일 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 베먼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Herbert III de Vermandois(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermengarde de Bar-sur-Seine(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1026년 프랑스 베먼도이스에서 Parvia de Chaulnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1045년 5월 25일 프랑스 베먼도이스에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.29 August 0979–25 MAY 1045: 0979 оны Наймдугаар сарын 29–1045 оны Тавдугаар сарын 25

pt.29 August 0979–25 MAY 1045: 29 de agosto de 0979–25 de maio de 1045
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eudes comte de Vermandois nasceu em 29 de agosto de 0979, em Vermand, Aisne, Picardie, França, seu pai, Herbert III de Vermandois, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Ermengarde de Bar-sur-Seine, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Parvia de Chaulnes aproximadamente 1026, em Vermandois, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de maio de 1045, em Vermandois, França, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eudes comte de Vermandois родился 29 августа 0979 г. в местности вирманд, эисн, пикарди, Франция, его отцу по имени Herbert III de Vermandois было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermengarde de Bar-sur-Seine, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Parvia de Chaulnes около 1026 г. в местности вирмандоис, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 25 мая 1045 г. в местности вирмандоис, Франция в возрасте 65 лет.

es.29 August 0979–25 MAY 1045: 29 de agosto de 0979–25 de mayo de 1045
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eudes comte de Vermandois nació el 29 de agosto de 0979, en Vermand, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Herbert III de Vermandois, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Ermengarde de Bar-sur-Seine, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Parvia de Chaulnes aproximadamente 1026, en Vermandois, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de mayo de 1045, en Vermandois, Francia, a la edad de 65 años.
